compiled_state.title: preplanning Step 6 missing orchestrator-managed design review loop (SC5 gap)
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: SC5 of epic 28cb-a23a requires preplanning to run review-protocol on design artifacts in a max-3-cycle feedback loop with INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED escalation in non-interactive sessions. The current implementation (dispatch-protocol.md Section 4 'Review Loop (Phase 5 Excluded)') only tags stories 'design:pending_review' and defers review to 'a later stage outside this protocol'. The review loop must be added to preplanning SKILL.md Step 6 or the dispatch protocol to satisfy SC5.

comments.body: CHECKPOINT:batch-complete — SC5 fix committed (83857fe4): Section 4 review loop with structured perspectives, caller_id, REVIEW_PASS/FAIL branching, INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED escalation at max_review_cycles=3. Tests pass.
comments.author: Test
